summary: Ship. R-1 is resolved: the unstable archive is gone, and lines 68–71 verify the checked-out commit before running `install.sh`; tag movement or tampering fails closed. Git officially supports `--branch` with tags, including detached checkout at the peeled commit ([docs](https://git-scm.com/docs/git-clone.html)). No new critical/high issue was introduced: Git is present on the ARM runner, GitHub and `sudo install.sh` were existing dependencies, and all 10 other tools retain SHA-256 verification.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
